doc_e4a56a90_0:
Mistral AI is a French artificial intelligence company founded in 2023.
The company develops open-weight and proprietary large language models (LLMs).
Mistral AI was founded by Arthur Mensch, Guillaume Lample, and Timothée Lacroix.
The company's headquarters are in Paris, France.
Mistral AI focuses on efficient, high-performance foundation models for text generation, reasoning, and coding.
doc_e4a56a90_1:
Its notable models include Mistral 7B, Mixtral 8x7B, Mixtral 8x22B, Mistral Large, Mistral Small, and Codestral.
Mixtral models use a Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architecture to improve efficiency.
Mistral AI provides APIs for chat, embeddings, function calling, and text generation.
The company supports both cloud deployment and self-hosted deployment for many of its models.
Mistral AI emphasizes openness, efficiency, and enterprise-ready AI solutions.
doc_e4a56a90_2:
Its models support multilingual tasks including English, French, German, Spanish, and several other languages.
Mistral AI offers embedding models for semantic search and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG).
The company provides document understanding, code generation, summarization, translation, and question-answering capabilities.
Mistral AI continuously releases updated models with improved reasoning, coding, and instruction-following performance.
